title: Copper Armor
body:
![Copper Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c53e9429ce0dac425e3f88b26d570376abe2c9a.png)![Copper Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YDvNvyRn/images/bae1afa1519346345a7fbb8cb3519bba253be1a1.jpeg)
This Data pack and Resource pack provides armor, that are made from copper. Basic craft, basic textures. Attributes are between leather and iron.

## Steps to install
**You don't need any modloaders to run that project, because it fully developed using vanilla Minecraft features.**
### To client
1. Download "copperarmor-X.X.X-rp.zip" and move it into your resourcepacks folder.
2. Download "copperarmor-X.X.X-dp.zip" and move it into your .minecraft/saves/<world_name>/datapacks folder.
3. Play with copper tools!

### To server
1. Download "copperarmor-X.X.X-dp.zip" to your server and move it into your <server_folder>/<world_name>/datapacks folder. You'll probably have to install it into several other worlds (Nether, End, etc).
2. Download "copperarmor-X.X.X-rp.zip" and move it into resourcepacks folder at player device.
